Why Choose DT Plumbing Solutions. We do more than just fix leaks. We deliver smart plumbing systems, clean installs, and long-term solutions built to last. Whether you're renovating, building from the ground up, or need urgent maintenance, we’re your reliable partner. With over a decade of hands-on experience, we’re known for showing up on time, doing the job right, and leaving every site clean and stress-free.

From relocating fixtures to fitting off high-end finishes, we work seamlessly with your builder or project manager to bring renovation plans to life — cleanly and efficiently. New Build Projects Custom plumbing installations from the ground up. We handle full-site plumbing for new residential homes or developments — from underground drainage to final fixture installs. Built to code, built to last. General Maintenance Reliable plumbing repairs and preventative care.

Ideal for renovations, repairs, or to avoid costly guesswork before digging Home filtration Installation Cleaner, safer water for your home. We supply and install premium home filtration systems to improve water quality and protect your plumbing. A smart, long-term solution for better living. GET IN TOUCH WITH US. Ready to solve your plumbing issues. Don’t wait around for small issues to become big ones. Whether you need a quote or want to book a job, we’re here and ready to help.

Whether it’s a leaky tap, blocked drain, or worn-out fittings, we keep your plumbing running smoothly. Trusted by homeowners, landlords, and property managers. Blocked Drains Fast, effective drain clearing with long-term results. Blocked sewer or stormwater pipe. We’ll clear the line using high-pressure water jetting to break through tree roots, grease, and built-up debris. Once cleared, we make sure the problem is properly resolved so it doesn’t return.
Reach out today and let our team take care of everything with the quality and care you can count on.

0 Skip to Content Home About Projects Services Contact Get a Free Quote Open Menu Close Menu Home About Projects Services Contact Get a Free Quote Open Menu Close Menu Home About Projects Services Contact Get a Free Quote OUR SERVICES End-to-End Plumbing Solutions for Sydney Homes & Businesses Plumbing services you can count on — for homes, builders, and businesses across Sydney and the Shire.

We pride ourselves on honest pricing, clear communication, and quality work — no patch jobs or shortcuts. AREAS OF EXPERTISE Trusted Plumbing Services In Sydney From new builds to renovations and maintenance, we deliver reliable plumbing across Sydney and the Sutherland Shire. Renovations Modern bathrooms, kitchens & full home renovations.

High Pressure Water Jetting Clears tough blockages fast without damaging pipes. We use professional-grade jetting equipment to break down stubborn debris, grease, and buildup inside pipes — ideal for emergency or preventative drain cleaning. Hot Water System Installation Hot water when and where you need it. We install and replace hot water systems for homes and businesses — electric, gas, or instantaneous units — with tidy pipework and tested performance.

CCTV Drain Inspections Precision diagnosis with real-time camera footage. Our drain camera technology allows us to inspect underground pipework and pinpoint the cause of blockages or breaks — no guesswork, just solutions. Sewer / Storm Pipe Locating Find hidden pipes with pinpoint accuracy. We use advanced locating equipment to trace stormwater and sewer lines underground.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for DT Plumbing Solutions — a Sydney-based company providing professional plumbing services including emergency plumbing, hot water systems, gas fitting, drain clearing, bathroom & kitchen renovations, leak repairs, and general plumbing maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 435 355 633 | Email: darcy@dtplumbingsolutions.com.au | Website: https://www.dtplumbingsolutions.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 435 355 633
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to DT Plumbing Solutions! How can we help you today?
